question:
Calculate the reliability and MTTF of $k$-out-of- $(2 k-1)$ systems when $d=3$,

$$
\lambda_1=0.0025 / h, \quad \lambda_2=0.005 / h, \quad \lambda_3=0.01 / h 	ext { and } \mu_1=\mu_2=\mu_3=0
$$

where $k=1,2,3,4$ and 5 for various time $t$. (Hints: using Eqs. (6.42) and (6.43)).
answer: Using Eqs. (42) and (43)), one can obtain the results.
